creator: olivierd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 143467
Shar file for sysutils/zeitgeist20

- Update sysutils/zeitgeist to 0.9.14

We need new port because some applications still use previous API 1.0, this new one provides 2.0.

- Add LICENSE
- Add CONFLICTS, because now sysutils/zeitgeist20 replaces sysutils/zeitgeist and sysutils/libzeitgeist
- Adjust dependencies
